files.notes: This file contains four weekly lessons for February, each with distinct subject areas: Theology/Testimony (parables), Work/Business (curfew law), Literature (Sidney Lanier biography), and Social Service (housing/housekeeping). Each lesson has clear boundaries with Roman numeral headings and week designations.
